creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Federico, thanks for the request.

The port was previously deleted from the tree because it was dependent on deprecated version of Squid:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=368306

Has that situation changed? Could you please verify and if so, submit a patch proposal to revive the port? You can take a look at the revival process (all but the last commit step):

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/ports.html#ports-qa-re-adding

I've added the previous maintainer to CC.

As a side-note, please take a look at www/e2guardian, a fork of Dansguardian.
